content.fact_text: Implementation of a production-grade SecurityService class providing Argon2id password hashing and AES-256-GCM encryption/decryption utilities.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides robust password hashing using Argon2id and authenticated encryption at rest using AES-256-GCM. The service enforces strict parameter requirements and provides complete integrity verification for all decryption operations.
provenance_data.utility: Provides cryptographic foundations for user authentication and sensitive data protection at rest, mandatory for production ecommerce systems.
